case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. SAFETY NATIONAL CASUALTY CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SAFETY NATIONAL CASUALTY CORPORATION MACK'S BAIL BONDS
